data.name: EGM: Efficiently Learning General Motion Tracking Policy for High Dynamic Humanoid Whole-Body Control

data.description: EGM: Efficiently Learning General Motion Tracking Policy for High Dynamic Humanoid Whole-Body Control discusses Hierarchical QP Whole-Body Control.
EGM: Efficiently Learning General Motion Tracking Policy for High Dynamic Humanoid Whole-Body Control proposes Whole-Body Control (WBC).
EGM: Efficiently Learning General Motion Tracking Policy for High Dynamic Humanoid Whole-Body Control uses Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO).
